description: Maps thematic indicator panels (theme_panel_config.json) to the holdings whose optionality they help explain. Used by apply_context_overlay.py to inject a context_overlay block into each tagged ticker's valuation.json. Context only: never a base-IRR input.

ai_power_land.rationale: AI compute demand -> power/grid/water constraint -> scarce Permian surface and hosting capacity. Explains repricing of land, surface, water, and AI-infra optionality.
